title: Turn off Travis builds against 1.6.
body: Some of our dependencies (will) expect 1.7's "context" package and fields of http.Transport which aren't in 1.6.

comments.body: @cgwalters Could you see why rh-atomic-bot is not working?
We had a small issue with webhooks since moving homu to a different cluster. You might have to close & re-open other PRs as well if it doesn't respond right away when you `r+`.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/43cc44ac8a9c59ea76b681321c57bea5c1c57158.1491916627792811264/index.html)
